name: bee-languages-get
description: The list of enabled website languages on the Bee Website Builder platform, used for language filtering, dropdown linkage, and as a dependency data source for other skills.

api_key.description: API_KEY is the secure credential used for API authentication. It identifies the caller and controls interface access permissions. Please obtain it from the developer platform at https://open.tradew.com before use.

status.description: Request status. `true` indicates success and `false` indicates failure.

language.description: Site language code identifier (for API use)
